nasb.text: Joshua spoke to the house of Joseph, to Ephraim and Manasseh, saying, “You are a numerous people and have great power; you shall not have one lot only,

esv.text: Then Joshua said to the house of Joseph, to Ephraim and Manasseh, “You are a numerous people and have great power. You shall not have one allotment only,

cnv.text: 約書亞對約瑟家，就是對以法蓮人和瑪拿西人說：“你們族大人多，勢力強大，不可以只抽一份地業；

ccb.text: 约书亚对约瑟的子孙以法莲人和玛拿西人说：“你们人口众多，势力强大，不应只得一签之地，
